about_item: 【Safe & Certified】Our CertiPUR-US certified foam is made without harmful chemicals to ensure zero toxic off-gassing, while the OEKO-TEX certified fabric is free from allergens and skin irritants. We prioritize your pet’s health so every nap is truly safe and worry-free.

【Orthopedic Support】Engineered with high-resiliency 25D egg-crate foam, this bed delivers targeted orthopedic relief by evenly distributing weight to alleviate strain on pressure points along the spine, hips, and joints. It is ideal for older dogs, large breeds, or pets with arthritis, helping to improve overall comfort and sleep quality.

【Waterproof & Machine Washable】A premium waterproof inner liner acts as a strong barrier against moisture, preventing liquids from seeping into the core foam. The removable outer cover is completely machine washable and dryer-safe, making it effortless to clean away dirt, fur, or odors for quick and hassle-free maintenance. DESIGN NOTE: The waterproof feature is applied to the top sleeping surface.

【Built to Last】Designed with durability in mind, the cover features reinforced stitching (at least 6 stitches per inch) and neatly bound fabric edges built to withstand frequent use and machine washing. It retains its shape, softness, and appearance over time, keeping your pet’s bed looking and feeling new.

【Perfect for All Scenarios】: Multiple sizes available for different pet breeds, body types and usage needs. Ideal for dog crates, car rides, outdoor trips and more, catering to your pet’s diverse lifestyle. Whether you need a bed for large dogs, a compact crate mat, or a portable travel pad, we’ve got the perfect fit for you.

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of high quality, comfortable, and easy to wash, with good value for money. The bed is durable, with one customer noting no signs of wear and tear, and they appreciate its soft material and firm feel. The size receives mixed feedback - while some find it great, others say it's not big enough for their needs. The thickness also gets mixed reviews, with some finding it nice while others describe it as semi-thin.

authors_reviews.title: Soft, yet supportive, great value, and my best friend's favorite dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: My adorable dog, who is my best furry friend, loves this bed. It is his preferred bed among the few we own. It is in a room where we typically have the door closed, and if we are in that space, he waits for the door to be opened for him. Great value and quality. As described, and a great size (41 inches) for my medium (overweight) dog to sprawl out with his blankie. Definitely recommend!
authors_reviews.author: KB

authors_reviews.title: Happy dogs
authors_reviews.text: A little stiff but the dogs seem to like them. pretty thick material I think will last a long time. fit perfect in the dog crates .
authors_reviews.author: john q

authors_reviews.title: Wonderful for senior dogs!

authors_reviews.title: Great quality
authors_reviews.text: Have had this bed for 2 months.Easy to maintain and wash, my German shepherd loves it and the pink is amazing 👏 very sturdy and comfortable ❤️
authors_reviews.author: Yesenia andrade

authors_reviews.title: Stiff cover
authors_reviews.text: Nice orthopedic bed. Good price. My elderly dog doesn't like it though, possibly because of the stiff-ish material that makes noise when she walks on it. Maybe the cover will soften with washes without compromising waterproof capability
authors_reviews.author: DNA

authors_reviews.title: I'm very pleased with this dog bed
authors_reviews.text: I bought this to be used in my big dog's cage so he'd have some type of comfort. The price was great as I didn't want to spend a lot on a memory foam bed for his cage as he immediately destroyed all other beds. This one was shrunked for shipping and inflated (expanded) on its own very easily and quickly. I did not notice any off-gasing smells/odors which was nice as most odd odors give me headaches. The thickness and quality of the memory foam seems to be working great for my dog's size (97 lbs). I'm not seeing any permanent indentions or signs of wear & tear. From what I am seeing from my dog's short use of this bed, it's providing him with more than enough support. This bed should be a great support for his aging joints and muscles (he just turned 6 yrs old). The best thing is that he has not destroyed this bed.
authors_reviews.author: Kimberly P.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Doggy Bed.
authors_reviews.text: My dog loves, he seem to be comfortable and it put him a position for looking out the window.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: My dog loves it
authors_reviews.text: My dog always sits right outside the kitchen when I am in there. Since we got this bed for him he won’t leave it and is happy. I am so happy we got it. It’s soft and easy to get the washable top off and on
authors_reviews.author: momstime
